title: Proxmox Service-Install Orchestration Provider
description: Drives per-guest service installs via the ansible repo and tracks installed-service state; companion to tofu-proxmox.

phases.title: Ansible engine
phases.exit_criteria: internal/ansible builds; argv assembly, PLAY RECAP parsing, token capture/_ct_url, and about.json parsing unit-tested.

items.description: ansible-playbook argv builder + exec with cwd + context timeout

phases.title: Resources
phases.exit_criteria: proxmoxsvc_service installs a service end-to-end; metadata data source reads about.json; provides_tokens wire into a dependent service.

phases.title: Hardening
phases.exit_criteria: uninstall convention + NetBox/PVE-tag write-back of provides_tokens.

items.description: stamp provides_tokens to PVE tags/description and NetBox local_context_data
